requirement: Every paid image-generation HTTP attempt must fail closed before network access unless an explicit run authorization, provider-call ceiling, declared maximum unit cost and total dollar ceiling are present.

implementationEvidence.requestBoundary: provider_renderer reserves budget immediately before each provider POST attempt
implementationEvidence.retryAccounting: every retry consumes one authorized provider call
implementationEvidence.offlineFallbackBoundary: authorization and ceiling errors are rethrown and cannot be converted into offline fallback output
implementationEvidence.stateReceipt: paid_request_state_<run-id>.json records call count, reserved estimated exposure and request IDs without prompts or secrets
implementationEvidence.zeroNetworkRegression: check_paid_forge_gate.py tests missing authorization and exhausted ceilings without calling a provider

runtimeVerification: NOT APPLICABLE UNTIL MERGED AND A SEPARATELY AUTHORIZED CAPPED PAID RUN IS EXECUTED
remainingCaveats: The receipt reserves estimated maximum cost; provider invoice reconciliation remains a separate promotion receipt.
No paid forge may run until explicit authorization and sufficient provider balance exist.
Asset promotion still requires provider request receipts, checksums, provenance, optimized derivatives, runtime wiring and visual review.
